title: An Account of [the Denunciation of Nasr] and of the Part Played in It by Hisham and Yusuf b. 'Umar
description: An Account of [the Denunciation of Nasr] and of the Part Played in It by Hisham and Yusuf b. 'Umar. Recorded under the year 122 AH (740–741 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 26.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 26
